Name: Amelia Foster
Notes: Consistently produces high-quality lab reports and explains reasoning clearly. Volunteers answers most lessons. Recently led her group's practical on rates of reaction with real confidence.

Name: Jayden Osei
Notes: Solid grasp of core concepts but rushes written explanations. Homework is submitted on time but often lacks the detail seen in his verbal answers. Responds well to being asked to slow down and explain his thinking.

Name: Sienna Kowalski
Notes: Has SEN support in place for working memory difficulties. Uses her scaffolded worksheets well and completes practicals successfully with a partner. Needs reminders to record results as she goes rather than after the experiment.

Name: Ibrahim Al-Rashid
Notes: Quiet in class but writes some of the strongest extended answers in the group when given time. Would benefit from being encouraged to contribute verbally more often, as his insights are consistently accurate.

Name: Poppy Whitfield
Notes: Struggles with attendance this term due to ongoing health appointments, which has created some gaps in practical experience. Catches up well when given one-to-one time and stays positive despite the disruption.

Name: Ronan McAllister
Notes: Highly capable but contributions are inconsistent, some lessons he leads group discussion, others he is off-task and distracts nearby students. Clearly enjoys practical work more than written tasks.
